items.name: Antique Cuirass
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Deter: When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 6% for 2 seconds (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

items.name: Athena's Shield
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Shield: Upon taking Magic Damage from enemy hero skills or Basic Attacks, reduces Magic Damage taken by 25% for 3 second (including the damage that triggers the effect)s. Regains this effect 5 seconds after leaving combat.

items.name: Azure Blade
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Judgement: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 50 extra True Damage (1.5 seconds cooldown).

items.name: Berserker's Fury
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +40% Crit Damage. Unique Passive - Doom: Critical strikes grant 5% extra Physical Attack for 2 seconds.

items.name: Black Ice Shield
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Fortress Shield: For each enemy hero within 5 units, Hybrid Defense is increased by 4, up to 20.

items.name: Blade Armor
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +20% Crit Damage Reduction. Unique Passive - Bladed Armor: When struck by a Basic Attack, deals Physical Damage equal to 30 (+2% Total Physical Defense)% of the incoming damage (calculated before Damage Reduction) to the attacker and slows them by 15% for 1 second.

items.name: Blade of Despair
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Despair: Dealing damage to non-Minion enemies below 50% HP increases Physical Attack by 25% for 2 seconds (takes effect before the damage is dealt).

items.name: Blade of the Heptaseas
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +15 Physical Penetration. Unique Passive - Ambush: If no damage is taken or dealt within 5 seconds (excluding from Minions or Creeps), the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 160 (+40% Total Physical Attack) Physical Damage and slow the target by 40% for 1.5 seconds.

items.name: Blood Wings
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Guard: Gains a 800 (+100% Magic Power) Shield that will regenerate 20 seconds after being damaged. The Shield also grants 30 Movement Speed while it lasts and 150 Movement Speed for 1 second after it breaks.

items.name: Brute Force Breastplate
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Brute Force: Each second after dealing damage, gain 8 extra Adaptive Attack and 2% extra Movement Speed for 4 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Gain 25% extra Control Duration Reduction at full stacks.

items.name: Chastise Pauldron
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Chastise: Taking damage will reduce the Attack Speed and Attack Speed cap of the attacker to 75% of normal for 2 seconds. Unique Passive - Redemption: When incoming damage reduces HP below 30%, recover 20% Max HP over the next 2 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

items.name: Clock of Destiny
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Destiny: Gains 4.5(+0.5*Hero Level) Hybrid Defense for 5 seconds when dealing Magic Damage to enemy heroes, stacking up to 6 times (can gain 1 stack every 0.4 second). Unique Passive - Gift: When HP drops below 50%, recovers 15% of HP over the next 3 seconds. When Mana drops below 50%, restores 15% of Mana over the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

items.name: Concentrated Energy
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +20% Hybrid Lifesteal. Unique Passive - Recharge: Increases Magic Power by 5 after dealing Magic Damage (this effect stacks up to 6 times and can only gain 1 stack every 0.4 second). When reaching full stacks, increases Magic Damage by 12% for 5 seconds.

items.name: Corrosion Scythe
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Corrosive: Basic Attacks gain 80 extra Physical Damage and slow the target by 8% (halved for ranged Basic Attacks) for 1.5 seconds. Stacks up to 5 times. Unique Passive - Impulse: Basic Attacks grant 6% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds, capped at 5 stacks.

items.name: Cursed Helmet
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Burning Soul: Deals (1.2% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies per second. This damage is increased by 125(+15*Hero Level)% against creeps and minions. Unique Passive - Curse: Dealing damage with Burning Soul will reduce the target's Hybrid Defense by 3 for 3 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

items.name: Demon Hunter Sword
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Engulf: Basic Attacks deal 8% of the target's current HP as extra physical damage (capped at 60 against minions). Unique Passive - Devour: Basic Attacks grant 2% Lifesteal for 3 seconds (stacks up to 5 times).

items.name: Demon Shoes
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Mysticism: Getting a kill or assist on an enemy Minion will restore 4% Mana. (An assist occurs when a Minion dies within 2 seconds after taking damage from the hero.)

items.name: Divine Glaive
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +40% Magic Penetration. Unique Passive - Spellbreaker: When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Magic Penetration for each point of the enemy's Magic Defense, capped at 20%.

items.name: Dominance Ice
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Fortress Shield: For each enemy hero within 5 units, Hybrid Defense is increased by 8, up to 40. Unique Passive - Lifebane: Taking damage will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects of the attacker to 60% of normal for 1 second.

items.name: Dreadnaught Armor
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Deter: When hit by a skill, reduces the attacker's Physical Damage by 4% for 2 seconds (this effect stacks up to 3 times).

items.name: Elegant Gem
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Gift: When HP drops below 50%, recovers 15% of HP over the next 3 seconds. When Mana drops below 50%, restores 15% of Mana over the next 3 seconds. Cooldown: 60 seconds.

items.name: Enchanted Talisman
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Mana Spring: Regenerates 15% of Max Mana every 10 seconds. Unique Passive - Magic Mastery: Max Cooldown Reduction is increased by 5%.

items.name: Endless Battle
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Divine Justice: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals (60% Total Physical Attack) extra True Damage and recovers 80 (+40% of Total Physical Attack) HP (1.5 seconds cooldown).

items.name: Feather of Heaven
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Affliction: Each Basic Attack deals extra 50 (+30% Total Magic Power) Magic Damage. Unique Passive - Impulse: Basic Attacks grant 6% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds, capped at 5 stacks.

items.name: Flask of the Oasis
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +12% Healing Effect. Unique Passive - Blessing: When casting a healing or shield skill, if the target's HP is below 35%, or falls below 35% within 3 seconds, they will get a (100*Hero Level) shield that lasts 3 seconds. When this effect triggers, it also reduces the cooldown of the caster's skills by 2 seconds. (This effect can only trigger once every 60 seconds on the same target, and will not trigger on self-only healing and shield skills.)

items.name: Fleeting Time
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Timestream: Hero kills or assists reduce the Ultimate's current cooldown by 30%.

items.name: Genius Wand
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +10 Magic Penetration. Unique Passive - Magic: Dealing Magic Damage to enemy heroes will reduce their Magic Defense by 3+(0.3*Hero Level) for 2 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

items.name: Glowing Wand
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Scorch: Dealing Magic Damage burns the targets for 3 seconds, also dealing extra Magic Damage equal to 1% of the target's Max HP per second. Unique Passive - Lifebane: Dealing damage to the target will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects on them to 60% of normal for 3 seconds.

items.name: Golden Staff
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Swift: Every 1% extra Crit Chance gained is converted into 1% extra Attack Speed. Unique Passive - Endless Strike: After every 2 non-Crit Basic Attacks, the Attack Speed of the next Basic Attack is increased by 80% (and Attack Speed cap is increased to 500%) and triggers Attack Effects an additional 2 time(s).

items.name: Great Dragon Spear
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Supreme Warrior: After casting an Ultimate, increase Movement Speed by 30% for 7.5 seconds. This effect has a 15 seconds cooldown.

items.name: Guardian Helmet
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Recovery: After 5 seconds out of combat, recover (2.5% Total HP) HP per second. Unique Passive - Defender: Upon taking more than 500 damage in a single instance, recover 20 (+0.3% Total HP)% HP from the excess damage beyond that amount.

items.name: Haas' Claws
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +20% Lifesteal. Unique Passive - Frenzy: Critical strikes grant 20% extra Attack Speed for 2 seconds.

items.name: Holy Crystal
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Mystery: Gains 21%-35% extra Magic Power (scales with level).

items.name: Hunter Strike
items.passive_description: Unique Attribute: +15 Physical Penetration. Unique Passive - Retribution: Dealing damage to the same enemy hero or creep 5 times in a row grants 50% extra Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds (8 seconds cooldown).

items.name: Ice Queen Wand
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Ice Bound: When a skill deals damage to an enemy hero, it will also slow them by 10% for 2 seconds (stacks up to 3 times). This effect has a 1 second cooldown.

items.name: Immortality
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Immortal: Resurrect 2.5 seconds upon death and gets 16% Max HP and a shield that can absorb 150(+70*Hero Level) damage. Shield lasts 3 seconds. This effect has a 210 seconds cooldown.

items.name: Lightning Truncheon
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Resonate: Every 6 seconds, the next skill echoes, dealing 170 (+85% Magic Power) extra Magic Damage to all enemies in range.

items.name: Magic Blade
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Lifeline: When taking damage that reduces HP below 30%, gains a (+60*Hero Level) shield (increases with level) and 50% Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

items.name: Malefic Gun
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Armor Buster: Increase Physical Penetration by 30%. Unique Passive - Malefic Energy: Increases Basic Attack range by 12%. When hitting a target, gains 10% Movement Speed for 0.5 seconds.

items.name: Malefic Roar
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Armor Buster: Increase Physical Penetration by 30%. Unique Passive - Breaker: When attacking an enemy, gains 0.1% extra Physical Penetration for each point of the enemy's Physical Defense, capped at 30%.

items.name: Molten Essence
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Burning Soul: Deals (0.6% Total HP) Magic Damage to nearby enemies per second. This damage is increased by 125(+15*Hero Level)% against creeps and minions.

items.name: Oracle
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Bless: Received Shield and HP Regen effects are increased by 30%.

items.name: Queen's Wings
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Demonize: When HP drops below 40%, gains 30% Damage Reduction for 3 seconds and reduces skill cooldowns by 2 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown. Unique Passive - Defiance: For every 1% HP lost, damage is increased by 0.25%, up to 15%.

items.name: Radiant Armor
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Holy Blessing: Taking Magic Damage grants 5(+1*Hero Level) Magic Defense for 5 seconds, up to 6 stacks (can only gain 1 stack(s) every 0.4 seconds).

items.name: Rapid Boots
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Side Effect: Loses 20 Movement Speed for 5 seconds upon dealing or taking damage.

items.name: Rose Gold Meteor
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Dragon Scale: Every 1% Lifesteal increases Hybrid Defense by 1, up to 50 (effect is halved for non-Fighter heroes). Unique Passive - Lifeline: When taking damage that reduces HP below 30%, gains a (120*Hero Level) shield (increases with level) and 50% Movement Speed that rapidly decays over 3 seconds. This effect has a 60 seconds cooldown.

items.name: Sea Halberd
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Lifebane: Dealing damage to a target will reduce the Shield and HP Regen effects on them to 60% of normal for 3 seconds. Unique Passive - Punish: Increase damage by 8% against enemy heroes with higher extra HP.

items.name: Sky Piercer
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Lethality: After dealing damage to an enemy hero, executes the hero if their HP is lower than 4%. Gains 10 stack(s) of Lethality for each kill and loses 30% current stack(s) for each death. Each stack of Lethality increases the HP threshold of the execute effect by 0.1%, stacking up 80 times.

items.name: Starlium Scythe
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Crisis: After casting a skill, the next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 100 (+100% Total Magic Power) extra True Damage and reduces the target's Movement Speed by 40% for 1.5 seconds (5 seconds cooldown).

items.name: Swift Crossbow
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Crossbow: Each Basic Attack deals 40 extra Adaptive Damage. Unique Passive - Impulse: Basic Attacks grant 3% extra Attack Speed for 3 seconds, capped at 5 stacks.

items.name: Thunder Belt
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Thunderbolt: Every 4 seconds, the next Basic Attack deals 50 (+100% Extra Physical Defense) (+100% Extra Magic Defense) extra True Damage to the target and enemies around them, and briefly slows them by 99%. Hybrid Defense permanently increases by 1 each time the attack hits an enemy hero. (This effect is reduced to 50% for Marksmen and Mages)

items.name: Tough Boots
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Fortitude: CC and Slow Duration reduced by 25%.

items.name: War Axe
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Fighting Spirit: Attacks grants 12 extra Physical Attack per second for 4 seconds, up to 6 stacks. Deals 10% extra True Damage based on the damage dealt (no damage reduction counted) at full stacks. (Marksmen, Mages, and Supports only receive 50% of these stacked effects.)

items.name: Warrior Boots
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Valor: Gains 4 extra Physical Defense for 3 seconds when taking Physical Damage, up to 20.

items.name: Wind of Nature
items.passive_description: Unique Active - Wind Chant: Become immune to all Physical Damage for 2 seconds (duration is halved for non-Marksmen; 90 seconds cooldown).

items.name: Windtalker
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Typhoon: Every 5-2 seconds (reduced by 0.2 seconds for each Basic Attack), the next Basic Attack will hit up to 3 enemy units for 150-362 Magic Damage. (This attack can Crit and the damage increases to 200% against Minions.)

items.name: Winter Crown
items.passive_description: Unique Active - Frozen: Becomes frozen, untargetable, and immune to damage for 2 seconds (100 seconds cooldown). Cannot move or cast skills while frozen, but skills already cast won't be interrupted.

items.name: Wishing Lantern
items.passive_description: Unique Passive - Butterfly Goddess: For every 800 Magic Damage dealt to an enemy hero (calculated before Damage Reduction), a Butterfly Goddess is summoned to attack the enemy hero, dealing Magic Damage equal to 8% of their Current HP.

glossary.desc: Total damage a hero can take before dying. Core stat for tanks and fighters.
Boosts basic attacks and physical skill damage. Main stat for marksmen, assassins, most fighters.
Boosts magic skill damage. Main stat for mages.
Reduces incoming physical damage. Has diminishing returns, so penetration counters it.
Reduces incoming magic damage. Build vs mage-heavy enemy teams.
How fast basic attacks fire. Critical for marksmen and on-hit heroes; capped per hero.
Cast skills more often. Stacks additively, capped at 40% (45% only with Enchanted Talisman).
How fast the hero moves around the map — for rotations, chasing, and kiting.
Ignores part of the enemy's physical defense. Flat pen applies before %, and can push defense below zero. Build vs tanks.
Ignores part of the enemy's magic defense. Same mechanic as phys pen — for mages shredding durable frontlines.
Probability a basic attack crits for 2x damage. Stacks additively from items/emblems. Marksman stat.
Raises the critical-strike multiplier above the default 200%. Pairs with crit chance.
Heals a % of damage dealt by BASIC ATTACKS. Sustain for marksmen and fighters. Lifebane items cut it.
Heals a % of damage dealt by SKILLS. AoE skills only restore 25%. Sustain for mages and skill fighters.
Generic term for ignoring enemy defense (physical or magic). The more tanks the enemy stacks, the more value it gives.
